hotspots.reason: Indirect indexing xv[cur_inds[j]] causes random memory access for each non-zero element

bottleneck_type.reasoning: Only 2 FLOPs (multiply-add) per memory access. Indirect indexing through cur_inds causes cache misses. Arithmetic intensity ~0.25 FLOPs/byte, severely memory-bound.

optimization_suggestions.details: Better vectorization and cache utilization with blocked storage

gpu_suitability.reasoning: Many rows can be processed in parallel. Modern GPUs handle irregular access better with large parallelism.
gpu_suitability.recommended_approach: Use cuSPARSE or implement CSR-Vector kernel with one warp per row
